zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Argentyne於1411年5月11日出生在英國素福爾可海萊斯沃斯時，她的父親John Argentine41歲，母親Margaret de Calthorpe20歲。她於大約1426年與William Alington III在英國坎布利其爾波迪夏馬結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1445年在英國坎布利其爾波迪夏馬享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Argentyne于1411年5月11日出生在英国素福爾可海萊斯沃斯时，她的父亲John Argentine41岁，母亲Margaret de Calthorpe20岁。她于大约1426年与William Alington III在英国坎布利其爾波迪夏馬结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1445年在英国坎布利其爾波迪夏馬享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Argentyne was born on 11 May 1411, in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, her father, John Argentine, was 41 and her mother, Margaret de Calthorpe, was 20. She married William Alington III about 1426, in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1445, in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Argentyne est née le 11 mai 1411, à Halesworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Argentine, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Calthorpe, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Alington III environ 1426, à Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1445, à Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Argentyne am 11. Mai 1411 in Halesworth, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Argentine 41 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Calthorpe 20. Sie hat um 1426 in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England William Alington III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1445 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Argentyne è nata il il 11 maggio 1411 nel Halesworth, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Argentine, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Calthorpe, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William Alington III circa 1426, nel Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1445, nel Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Argentyneが1411年5月11日にイギリススフォルクヘイレスウオルスで生まれた時，父John Argentineは41歳，母Margaret de Calthorpeは20歳であった。約1426年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボッティシャムでWilliam Alington IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1445年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボッティシャムで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Argentyne(이)가 1411년 5월 11일 영국 수폴크 헤일스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Argentine(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Calthorpe(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1426년 영국 캄브리지실르 벗티샤에서 William Alington III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 캄브리지실르 벗티샤에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Argentyne nasceu em 11 de maio de 1411, em Halesworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Argentine, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Calthorpe, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Alington III aproximadamente 1426, em Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1445, em Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Argentyne родилась 11 мая 1411 г. в местности хэлесворт, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Argentine было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Calthorpe, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Alington III около 1426 г. в местности боттишам, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1445 г. в местности боттишам, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.
